concerns.analysis: The agenda in the source document is a single continuous numbered list from 1 to 11. The conversion process has split this into three separate list elements in the JSON (indexes 11, 13, and 15) due to the presence of tables between list items. This breaks the structural continuity of the single list, as each new list element will logically restart its numbering or lose its connection to the overall list structure.

concerns.output_quote: The Agenda is split into three separate 'list' elements: items 1-4 (index 11), item 5 (index 13), and items 6-11 (index 15).
